t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Manual override name for the marketing region, from Ext_Dim_Country. May differ from Region (e.g., Albania: Region=ROE, MarketingRegionManualName=CEE). Used when the automated MarketingRegion label needs a business-friendly correction.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Manual override name for the marketing region, from Ext_Dim_Country. May differ from Region (e.g., Albania: Region=ROE, MarketingRegionManualName=CEE). Used when the automated MarketingRegion label needs a business-friendly correction. Passthrough from Dim_Country (renamed from MarketingRegionManualName). 14 distinct values: Arabic, Australia, CEE, French, German, Italian, Latam, Nordics, ROW, SEA, Spain, UK, Unknown, USA.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: None — upstream text preserved verbatim with additive lineage and enum context

issues.problem: Revenue accumulation date stated as '2024-09-30' but SP code calls Function_Revenue_Total(20190101, 20241027, 1) — actual end date is 2024-10-27. Writer followed SP comment instead of code.

Description says Metric='FullCommission' is renamed to 'TotalFullCommission' via CASE, but the WHERE clause filters for 'TotalFullCommission' directly. After the 2025-10-17 DDR refactor, the CASE may be a defensive no-op. Note could mislead analysts about the actual metric name in the DDR source.
No Phase Gate Checklist section with explicit P2/P3 checkboxes. Data claims (336 rows, 31 NULLs, Clients range 0–219458) appear genuine but lack formal phase gate documentation.
Atlassian knowledge sources skipped — no external documentation enrichment. Noted as 'No Atlassian MCP available.'
Empty string vs NULL Currency semantics correctly documented in Gotchas and review-needed sidecar. Good coverage of a subtle JOIN hazard.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Minor fixes only: (1) Change 'accumulated through 2024-09-30' to 'accumulated through 2024-10-27' in Section 1 and opening summary to match the actual SP parameter 20241027. (2) Clarify Element 4 TotalFullCommission description — note that the Metric CASE rename from 'FullCommission' may be a no-op after the DDR refactor since the WHERE filters for 'TotalFullCommission' directly. (3) Add a Phase Gate Checklist section documenting which data-validation phases were completed.

skipped_phases: Phase Gate Checklist not present as a formal section
